title: Explosive Party (Colored Explosions/TNT)
description: Blow everything up in Style with custom Particle Colours for TNT, Beds, End Crystals & other large explosions
body:
# Explosive Party We all like blowing things up right? Well why don't we like it a little bit more by adding some fancy colouring! - Configure EVERY different explosion - Quick Switch Colour Modes - Supports up to 6 different Custom Effect Colours - Change Particle Settings (Toggle, Size & Animation Speed) - Completely Custom Colours (Colour Picker included with [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)) - Only needed Client Side (syncing explosion types requries server side) - Pride Flag Colour Modes - Compatible with [Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement)
Explosions with the new configuration (v2.0.0) ![New Configuration Stuff](https://i.imgur.com/l8fC0jB.gif) Explosions from the Wind Burst Item and Enchant ![Wind Burst](https://i.imgur.com/OdUGRck.gif) Explosions when using with [Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement) ![Explosion Enhanced](https://i.imgur.com/W9yWRw3.gif)
Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) + [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)
[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for easy Config editing *Feel free to use this mod in other modpacks but keep the download within the Modrinth Ecosystem and do not reupload*
